tool_args.label: July 2022 Transit Bus Committee Board Meeting
tool_args.raw_text: TRANSIT BUS COMMITTEE ACTIONS and PRESENTATIONS SUMMARY for JULY 2022

payload.description: Board meeting to approve various procurements including all-electric buses, inspection/testing contract extension, and fuel contract extension

tool_args.label: Lead AEB In-Service Evaluation - October 2023
tool_args.raw_text: The lead bus is scheduled for in-service evaluation starting in October 2023.

payload.description: Lead bus scheduled for in-service evaluation for the five Nova Bus low-floor 40-foot all-electric buses

tool_args.label: Delivery of All Five AEBs - April 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Delivery of all five buses is anticipated to be completed in April 2024.

payload.description: Delivery completion of all five Nova Bus low-floor 40-foot all-electric buses

tool_args.label: WSP Contract Extension Start - November 1, 2022
tool_args.raw_text: two-year contract extension for worldwide inspection and testing services (November 1, 2022–October 31, 2024)

payload.description: Two-year extension of WSP worldwide inspection and testing services contract

tool_args.label: Sprague Fuel Contract Extension - September 1, 2022
tool_args.raw_text: from September 1, 2022, to August 31, 2023, to furnish and deliver Ultra Low Sulfur Diesel #2 Fuel

payload.description: One-year option extension of Sprague fuel delivery contract for NYC Transit and MTA Bus Company

tool_args.label: Nova Bus AEB Total Amount - $8,275,562
tool_args.raw_text: Total Amount: $8,275,562

payload.description: Total contract amount for five low-floor 40-foot all-electric buses from Nova Bus (US) Inc.

tool_args.label: WSP Contract Extension - $20,000,000
tool_args.raw_text: This request: $ 20,000,000

payload.description: Requested modification amount for two-year extension of WSP worldwide inspection and testing services

tool_args.label: Sprague Fuel Contract Extension - $209,923,366
tool_args.raw_text: this request: NYCT: $ 160,500,243 MTABC: $ 49,423,123

payload.description: Estimated combined total for one-year option extension of Sprague ULSD fuel contracts for NYC Transit and MTA Bus Company

tool_args.label: Per-Bus Price - $1,431,029/bus
tool_args.raw_text: $7,155,145 for the five buses ($1,431,029/bus)

payload.description: Per-bus price for the five low-floor 40-foot all-electric buses

tool_args.label: Total Procurement Agenda - $238.2M
tool_args.raw_text: The Procurement Agenda this month includes 4 actions for a proposed estimated expenditure of $238.2M.

payload.description: Total proposed estimated expenditure for all 4 procurement actions

tool_args.label: MTA Zero-Emission Fleet by 2040
tool_args.raw_text: This procurement is part of a key initiative by the Department of Buses as the MTA develops a long-range plan to transition to a completely zero-emissions bus fleet by year 2040.

payload.claim_text: This procurement is part of a key initiative by the Department of Buses as the MTA develops a long-range plan to transition to a completely zero-emissions bus fleet by year 2040.

tool_args.label: WSP Program Expansion to LIRR and MNR
tool_args.raw_text: in early 2022 it was determined that this program will be expanded to include the requirements of Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR") and Metro-North Railroad ("MNR") in addition to NYC Transit and C&D.

payload.claim_text: In early 2022 it was determined that this program will be expanded to include the requirements of Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad in addition to NYC Transit and C&D.
payload.description: WSP worldwide inspection and testing program expanded to LIRR and MNR

tool_args.label: WSP Cost Avoidance - $1.6 Million
tool_args.raw_text: WSP originally proposed increasing the base contract rates by 8 percent for the extension period. Through discussions, Procurement was able to secure the base contract pricing for the extension period with no increase. As a result, approximately $1.6 million in cost avoidance will be realized.

payload.claim_text: Procurement secured base contract pricing for extension period with no increase, resulting in approximately $1.6 million in cost avoidance.

tool_args.label: AEBs Will Operate Between Bronx and Upper Manhattan
tool_args.raw_text: The five low-floor 40-foot AEBs in this contract will operate between the Bronx and upper Manhattan and will utilize the in-depot charging stations already installed at Kingsbridge Depot.

payload.claim_text: The five low-floor 40-foot AEBs in this contract will operate between the Bronx and upper Manhattan and will utilize the in-depot charging stations already installed at Kingsbridge Depot.
